title: Jaisalmer hottest at 43.7 degrees amid rain activity in parts of Rajasthan - newsdrum.in
full_text:
Jaipur (PTI): Light to moderate rain accompanied by dust storms and thunderstorms was recorded at isolated places across eastern and western Rajasthan during the past 24 hours, the Meteorological Department said on Thursday.
Hot night conditions prevailed at one or two places in western Rajasthan, including Phalodi, officials said.
Sangod in Kota district recorded the highest rainfall in the state at 28 mm during the period, they said.
Jaisalmer was the hottest place in Rajasthan, recording a maximum temperature of 43.7 degress Celsius, while Sangaria in Hanumangarh district registered the highest minimum temperature at 33.2 degrees Celsius.
Ajmer recorded the state's lowest minimum temperature at 21.9 degrees Celsius, officials added.
